PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?celebrity ?celebrityLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q3468953 wdt:P161 ?celebrity .
  ?celebrity rdfs:label ?celebrityLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?celebrityLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?celebrityLabel) , 'kelly monaco'))
}
